allow: Bash(node -e "const fr=require\(''''./src/i18n/fr.json''''\);const en=require\(''''./src/i18n/en.json''''\);const frKeys=Object.keys\(fr\);const enKeys=Object.keys\(en\);const missing=frKeys.filter\(k=>!enKeys.includes\(k\)\);console.log\(''''FR keys:'''',frKeys.length,''''EN keys:'''',enKeys.length,''''Missing in EN:'''',missing.join\('''', ''''\)||''''none''''\)")

Bash(node -e "const fr=require\(''./src/i18n/fr.json''\);const en=require\(''./src/i18n/en.json''\);const frKeys=Object.keys\(fr\);const enKeys=Object.keys\(en\);const missing=frKeys.filter\(function\(k\){return !enKeys.includes\(k\);}\);console.log\(''FR keys:'',frKeys.length,''EN keys:'',enKeys.length,''Missing in EN:'',missing.join\('', ''\)||''none''\)")
